content: GANDHI INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING TECHNOLOBY LINIVERSITY, ODISHA, GUNUPUR (GIET LINIVERSITY) OFFICE OF THE CONTROLLER OF EXAMINATIONS Ref. No. 1Q) /GIETU/Exam/2026 Date: - 05/01/2026 NOTICE It is for information of the students of B. Tech. Aeronautical Engineering that, the Registration and Form Fill up for the Semester End Examinations of the following Course will Registration Fees Rs. 2000/- be held as per the schedule given below. Form Fill up Fees Dates of Registration/Form Fill up 06.01.2026 1t to 07.01.2026 i Programme / Semester Course B. Tech. Aeronautical Engineering Rs. 1500/- » Students are advised to clear their dues before the form fill up. » Students are advised to complete the registration and form fill up through ERP (Online). > Application Received after the due date will not be considered. » The Semester End Examinations will commence from 12t January’ 2026 and the Examination Schedule is available at University Website.
